emails.label: Review Drop
emails.subject: We tested these shorts for 4+ hours straight. Here's what happened.
emails.preview_text: Our WSS™ verdict on the Bimble & Bolt 8
emails.body_html:
Hi there,

We wore these shorts for four-plus hours. They didn't move. Not once.

Finding women's running shorts that actually work — stay put, don't chafe, carry your stuff, and feel good past hour four — is genuinely harder than it should be.

So we put the Bimble & Bolt 8" Run Shorts BLACK through it properly: short runs, gym sessions, full endurance outings well past the four-hour mark. Short answer? They passed every single test.

Our standout WSS™ finding:

The seamless front panel delivered zero irritation, zero seam dig, and zero chafing — even across the longest efforts we threw at it. Combined with pockets deep enough for a phone, nutrition, and a banana, and a stay-put waistband that never once folded or crept down? This is a short that solves real problems.

Our WSS™ overall score: 4.3 / 5 ★

At £46.00, these are quietly one of the smartest pairs of women's running shorts we've come across — and we've worn a lot of them.

Read the Full WSS™ Review →

If you're already convinced — or you just want to see them for yourself:

Shop the Bimble & Bolt 8" Run Shorts →

emails.label: Buy Nudge (day 4)
emails.subject: 3 reasons serious runners are choosing these shorts
emails.preview_text: Pockets, no chafe, and a waistband that actually stays put — here's the short version.
emails.body_html:
Hi there,

Still thinking about those Bimble & Bolt shorts?

In case you missed our review — or just want the highlights — here's what our WSS™ testing found about the Bimble & Bolt 8" Run Shorts BLACK:

✓

Completely chafe-free across 4+ hour efforts — the seamless front panel eliminates the irritation and seam dig that ruins long runs. No fiddling. No adjusting. Just running.
✓

Pockets that genuinely work — two deep side pockets (phone, gels, and yes, a banana all fit) plus a rear zip pocket for keys, cards, or emergency cash. Built for real endurance use.
✓

Multi-length sizing (4"–10") across XXS–XXL — a rare nod to proportional fit thinking that puts these shorts ahead of most competitors. The 8" inseam hits a brilliant sweet spot for coverage without restriction.

WSS™ Overall Score: 4.3 / 5 ★  |  Price: £46.00

These outperformed Lululemon and Sweaty Betty equivalents in our testing — at a significantly lower price point.

Shop the Bimble & Bolt 8" Run Shorts →

Quick fit note: the waistband runs snug initially — if you're between sizes or prefer a little breathing room, we'd suggest going up one. The 8" inseam is true to length.

emails.label: Social Proof (day 7)
emails.preview_text: What the WSS community is saying about distraction-free running kit.
emails.body_html:
Hi there,

The best thing about great running kit? You forget you're wearing it.

At WSS, we test kit so you don't have to find out the hard way — mid-race, ten miles in — that your shorts have other ideas.

This week, women in our community have been talking about the thing that matters most in running kit: the absence of distraction. No riding up. No chafing. No digging waistbands. No pocket bounce. Just the run.
